title: Club news: Mutual UFO Network meets May 23
description: Benton County Senior Democrats monthly luncheon and meeting will take place May 18 at Golden Corral, located at 2605 W. Pleasant Crossing Drive in Rogers.

title: Christian Leaders Urge Caution on New UFO Photos, Warning of a 'Generation Primed for Deception'
description: Religious scholars challenge the extraterrestrial narrative of UFO sightings, offering biblical explanations for phenomena documented in declassified government files.

title: CIA-funded researcher claims four alien species have been pulled from crashed UFO
description: The bombshell claim came during an appearance on "The Diary of a CEO" podcast alongside filmmaker Dan Farah.

title: Former Wyoming politician hid UFO sighting so people didn’t think he was ‘off his rocker'
description: A retired Wyoming attorney general is opening up about his possible UFO sighting 35 years ago
